title: Lead Instructional Designer at SRM University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at SRM University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
